design_philosophy: Function-first, stark contrast, terminal-inspired elements combined with polished Swiss layout principles. Data density is high, but spacing is deliberate. Focus on optical clarity, grid alignments, and purely functional colors. This is a technical 'control room' for enterprise LLM management.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Strict grid hierarchy. Dashboard uses MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID. Density, Data Correlation, Scanability.
layout_and_spacing.grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-zinc-800), no shadow. On hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), border color lightens (border-zinc-600), subtle glow.
surface_strategies.headers: Solid Background with a hard bottom border (border-zinc-800). No glassmorphism unless scrolling over complex charts.
surface_strategies.toggles_buttons: Sharp inner contrasts. 1px solid strokes instead of soft shadows.

components.general: Use Shadcn UI components heavily customized to match the Swiss & High-Contrast dark theme (flat, borders, subtle rounded-md).
components.charts: Use Shadcn charts (Recharts). Stick to monochrome + 1 accent color for data visualization to avoid looking cluttered.
components.cards: Go mostly cardless where possible by using grid layout with borders (Grid Borders technical look), or minimal flat cards.
components.navigation: Sidebar navigation with distinct active states (e.g. left border highlight or white background with dark text for active).

accessibility.contrast: All text must pass WCAG AA. Hover states must explicitly set text color (e.g., hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white).

backgrounds.description: Abstract AI network background for empty states or login
Server infrastructure visual for infrastructure pages

instructions_to_main_agent: Build out the 9 dashboard pages using React Router and a persistent sidebar layout.
Implement the 'Overview' page with metrics cards (Savings, Hit Rate, Token Reduction) and charts.
Implement 'Routing Intelligence' with a decisions table and model distribution charts.
Implement 'Semantic Cache' with a threshold tuner slider and hit/miss line chart.
Implement 'Budget Governance' with burn progress bars and RBAC policies view.
Implement 'Autonomous Actions' with a live feed.
Implement 'Optimization Log' with token before/after comparison.
Implement 'Playground' for testing completions and seeing cache hits.
Use Recharts for all charts (Shadcn charts).
Apply 'Grid Borders' layout to make the dashboard feel like a dense, technical control room.
Avoid generic Tailwind colors; stick to the defined grayscale (zinc) and white.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Import Google Fonts specified in typography.font_imports into index.css or equivalent.
Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors and font families.
